skills.label: Frame Investigation Question
skills.description: Pose a focused sustained-investigation question suited to drawing (mark-making, light, space).

skills.label: Plan Materials Exploration
skills.description: Map materials/processes to try and how to document them.

skills.label: Experiment Deliberately
skills.description: Design trials that test ideas, not only polish.

skills.label: Revise from Critique
skills.description: Use feedback to change form, process, or concept.

skills.label: Curate Selected Works
skills.description: Choose works that best demonstrate skill and idea range.

skills.label: Document Works Clearly
skills.description: Photograph/present pieces so skill and intent read well.

skills.label: Build Sustained Series
skills.description: Show inquiry developing across a related body of work.

skills.label: Write Portfolio Evidence
skills.description: State inquiry, materials, and processes clearly and briefly.

skills.label: Link Images to Ideas
skills.description: Explain how specific works advance the investigation.

skills.label: Run Structured Critique
skills.description: Give/receive critique tied to inquiry and skill goals.

skills.label: Audit Portfolio Alignment
skills.description: Check that images and writing meet portfolio criteria.
